ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Total market capitalization of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield as a percentage */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* Highest price in the past 52 weeks */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* Lowest price in the past 52 weeks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Total volume of stocks traded on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted close price of the stock on the given date */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume weighted average price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the stock on the given date */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous day's close price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (buy/sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Exact time the trade was executed */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged out */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "session_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was last updated */,
  "portfolio_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock related to the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the index */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change of the index from the previous day */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the index value */,
  "previous_value" REAL /* Previous day's value of the index */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)
